REFERENCE: Multiple components of this reference are inconsistent with authentic publication data. The Lancet in 2021 uses volume numbering around 397-398, not 184 (which would correspond to approximately 1914). The DOI prefix 10.1065 is not associated with The Lancet (which uses 10.1016/S0140-6736). The author (Joseph Peiris) is primarily known for respiratory virus research, not polio. The article details do not match a real Lancet publication.
